# Transactional Email Templates

*Marketing*. A predesigned email layout, and sometimes content, that you can apply to transactional emails.

For non-technical and technical people to design to the email their recipients receive, Twilio SendGrid provides [transactional email templates][dynamic templates]. You can modify these templates in the [Design or Code Editor][editors].
